ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M) */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "high_hip" REAL /* High hip measurement in inches */,
  "low_hip" REAL /* Low hip measurement in inches */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is designed for */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the product is designed for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size related to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items available in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed) for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item is part of */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date of the shipping */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is being shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
